name: United States
topIncomeNote: Federal top rate only (37% for 2025, PwC). No single combined figure: most states levy their own income tax on top (eight states have none; few state rates exceed 10%), so the combined top rate varies by state.
corporateNote: Tax Foundation 2025 combined rate (25.57%): 21% federal plus average state corporate tax; state CIT ranges from 0% to 12% and is deductible against federal tax.
vatNote: No national VAT; state and local sales taxes average 7.5% combined (population-weighted, 7.53% as of 1 Jan 2026, Tax Foundation: taxfoundation.org/data/all/state/sales-tax-rates/).

sources.label: PwC Worldwide Tax Summaries - United States, taxes on personal income
Tax Foundation - Corporate Tax Rates Around the World, 2025
OECD Revenue Statistics 2025 - highlights brochure (Table 1)

name: Canada
topIncomeNote: Combined federal (33%) plus Ontario top rate for 2026 (PwC: 53.5%). Provincial top rates vary; the highest combined rate is 54.8% in Newfoundland and Labrador.
corporateNote: Tax Foundation 2025 combined rate (25.98%): 15% federal plus provincial/territorial corporate taxes (8%-15%, not federally deductible).
vatNote: Federal GST is 5%; combined federal plus provincial sales taxes (HST/PST/QST) range from 5% to 15% (PwC VAT quick chart).

sources.label: PwC Worldwide Tax Summaries - Canada, taxes on personal income
Tax Foundation - Corporate Tax Rates Around the World, 2025
OECD Revenue Statistics 2025 - highlights brochure (Table 1)

name: Mexico
topIncomeNote: Top progressive rate for residents (PwC). No sub-central income tax on employment income.
corporateNote: Federal rate; no sub-central corporate income tax (Tax Foundation 2025).
vatNote: Standard rate per PwC VAT quick chart.
taxToGdpNote: Provisional 2024 figure, OECD Revenue Statistics 2025; the lowest in the OECD.

OECD Revenue Statistics 2025 - highlights brochure (Table 1)

name: Chile
topIncomeNote: Top rate of the progressive second-category/global complementary tax (PwC).
corporateNote: 27% under the general (partially integrated) regime (Tax Foundation 2025); 25% applies under the SME regime (PwC).
vatNote: Standard rate per PwC VAT quick chart.

sources.label: PwC Worldwide Tax Summaries - personal income tax rates quick chart
Tax Foundation - Corporate Tax Rates Around the World, 2025
OECD Revenue Statistics 2025 - highlights brochure (Table 1)

name: Colombia
topIncomeNote: Top progressive rate for residents (PwC). No sub-central income tax on employment income.
corporateNote: National rate; no sub-central corporate income tax (Tax Foundation 2025).
vatNote: Standard rate per PwC VAT quick chart.
taxToGdpNote: Provisional 2024 figure, OECD Revenue Statistics 2025; fell 2.2 percentage points from 2023, the largest OECD decline that year.

name: Costa Rica
topIncomeNote: Top rate on employment income (also 25% for self-employment income) per PwC.
corporateNote: National rate; no sub-central corporate income tax (Tax Foundation 2025).
vatNote: Standard rate per PwC VAT quick chart.

name: Australia
topIncomeNote: Includes the 2% Medicare levy: 45% top marginal rate on taxable income over AUD 190,000 plus the 2% levy that applies to most residents (PwC). No state income taxes.
corporateNote: Standard rate (Tax Foundation 2025); 25% applies to 'small-medium business' entities (PwC).
vatNote: Goods and services tax (GST) per PwC VAT quick chart.
taxToGdpNote: 2023 figure; provisional 2024 data for Australia was not available in OECD Revenue Statistics 2025.

name: New Zealand
topIncomeNote: Top marginal rate (PwC). No sub-central income taxes.
corporateNote: National rate; no sub-central corporate income tax (Tax Foundation 2025).
vatNote: Goods and services tax (GST) per PwC VAT quick chart.

name: Japan
topIncomeNote: Combined top rate computed from PwC components: 45% national top rate plus the 2.1% national surtax (45 x 1.021 = 45.9%) plus the flat 10% local inhabitant's tax.
corporateNote: Tax Foundation 2025 combined national plus local rate (29.74%); the headline national CIT rate alone is 23.2% (PwC).
vatNote: Consumption tax (Japan's VAT) per PwC VAT quick chart; a reduced 8% rate applies to certain items.
taxToGdpNote: 2023 figure; provisional 2024 social security contribution data for Japan was not available in OECD Revenue Statistics 2025.

sources.label: PwC Worldwide Tax Summaries - Japan, taxes on personal income
Tax Foundation - Corporate Tax Rates Around the World, 2025
OECD Revenue Statistics 2025 - highlights brochure (Table 1)

name: South Korea
topIncomeNote: Combined top rate stated by PwC: 45% national top rate plus local income tax assessed at 10% of the PIT rates (4.5% at the top bracket).
corporateNote: Combined 25% national top rate plus 2.5% local income tax for fiscal years starting on or after 1 Jan 2026 (PwC). Tax Foundation's 2025 combined figure was 26.4% (24% national top rate then in force).
vatNote: Standard rate per PwC VAT quick chart.
